home.intro: PetTripFinder helps you find genuinely pet-friendly hotels, restaurants, and parks, with the actual pet policy spelled out before you book, not buried in fine print.
home.subhead: Every listing includes the real pet policy, so there are no surprises at check-in.
home.message: Some listings are sponsored placements, always clearly labeled.

pet-friendly-hotels.intro: Hotels that genuinely welcome dogs and cats, with pet fees and weight limits listed up front so you know exactly what to expect.

pet-friendly-parks.intro: Off-leash parks and green spaces where your dog can run, with amenity details like fencing, water stations, and waste bags for every park.

pet-friendly-restaurants.intro: Restaurants and cafes with pet-welcoming patios, water bowls, and outdoor seating, checked before they're listed.

/about/.intro: PetTripFinder is a directory of pet-friendly places to stay, eat, and play with your dog or cat.
/about/.body: We started PetTripFinder because pet policies are usually buried in fine print or missing entirely, and travelers with pets deserve better information before they book.

/methodology/.intro: Listings are compiled from publicly available business information and, where available, information provided directly by the business. Pet policies can change, so please confirm directly with the business before you travel.
/methodology/.body: Sponsored placements are always labeled as sponsored, both on category pages and on the listing's own profile page. We do not currently operate a formal verification program, so no listing is marked as independently verified unless that changes.

/contact/.intro: Questions about a listing, or run a pet-friendly business you'd like to see included? Reach out and we'll get back to you.
/contact/.body: We read every message and try to respond within a few business days.

footer.disclosures: Some listings are sponsored placements or contain affiliate links, always clearly labeled. Pet policies may change; confirm directly with the business before you travel.
